speaking_style: Smooth and courteous. Careful with words. Never says anything that could be held against them.
backstory_seeds: manages the establishment for an absent owner who trusts them completely
has a network of contacts built through years of pouring drinks for the right people
wants to own their own place eventually and is working toward it
knows things about the town's merchant class they've never told anyone
dual_role_context: Serves with efficiency and discretion. Remembers what regulars order. Will suggest the better option if asked.
